creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
uname -a ...

  FreeBSD holstein.holy.cow 8.4-STABLE FreeBSD 8.4-STABLE #1 r277822: Tue Jan 27 21:38:21 HST 2015     root@holstein.holy.cow:/misc/obj/misc/src.svn/8/sys/X200-SMP.8  i386


grep -v '^(#|[ \t]*$)' /etc/make.conf ...

  LOCALBASE=    /misc/local
  LINUXBASE=    ${LOCALBASE}/linux
  OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT= c6
  OVERRIDE_LINUX_NONBASE_PORTS= c6
  CPUTYPE?=     nocona
  WITHOUT_modules=      ipfw ipfilter
  WITH_OPTIMIZED_FLAGS= yes
  WITH_OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS=        yes
  DOC_LANG=     en_US.ISO8859-15
  WRKDIRPREFIX= /misc/work/ports
  PACKAGES=     /misc/pkgs
  WITHOUT_SENDMAIL=     yes
  WITHOUT_JAVA= yes
  QT4_OPTIONS+=QGTKSTYLE
  PERL_VERSION= 5.20
  PERL5_DEFAULT= 5.20

... and /etc/ports.conf ...

  LOCALBASE=    /misc/local
  LINUXBASE=    ${LOCALBASE}/linux
  CPUTYPE?=     nocona
  DOC_LANG=     en_US.ISO8859-15
  WRKDIRPREFIX= /misc/work/ports
  PACKAGES=     /misc/pkgs
  WITH_PKG=     yes
  WITH="OPTIMIZED_FLAGS OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS"
  WITHOUT_CUPS= yes
  WITHOUT_SAMBA=        yes
  WITHOUT_HAL=  yes
  WITHOUT_DBUS= yes
  WITHOUT_GTK2= yes
  WITHOUT_GNOME=        yes
  WITHOUT_GNOMEVFS=     yes
  WITHOUT_ICONV=        yes
  WITHOUT_NLS=  yes
  WITHOUT_JACK= yes
  WITHOUT_JAVA= yes
  WITHOUT="DEVIL CUPS SAMBA HAL DBUS GCONF GNOME GNOMEVFS JAVA JACK ICONV NLS"


cd /misc/ports/www/aria2 && make showconfig ...

  ===> The following configuration options are available for aria2-1.18.9:
       CA_BUNDLE=off: Use CA bundle from Mozilla Project
       DOCS=off: Build and/or install documentation
       NLS=off: Native Language Support
       SQLITE=on: SQLite database support


config.log: http://bitter-almonds.com/tmp/freebsd/www-aria2-config.log (Ports is at r379511 version).
